allow: Bash(node -e "const pty = require\('node-pty'\); const t = pty.spawn\('tmux', ['list-sessions'], { name: 'xterm-256color', cols: 80, rows: 24, cwd: process.env.HOME, env: process.env }\); t.onData\(d => process.stdout.write\(d\)\); t.onExit\(\({exitCode}\) => { console.log\('[exit]', exitCode\); process.exit\(0\); }\);")
